## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs to help explain the problem.

<details>
<summary>Console / Error Logs</summary>

```
Paste logs here
```

</details>

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **PrismOS Version:** [e.g. v0.2.0]
- **Ollama Version:** [e.g. 0.6.x]
- **Model(s) in use:** [e.g. mistral, llama3.2]
- **RAM / GPU:** [e.g. 16 GB RAM, NVIDIA RTX 3060]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. does it happen every time? did it start after an update?).
